## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Erratum fix (mathematical correction)
- [ ] Proof clarification or alternative proof
- [ ] New or improved example / exercise
- [ ] Diagram or figure improvement
- [ ] Citation / bibliography fix

## Checklist

- [ ] PDF compiles cleanly (`cd textbook && latexmk -pdf main.tex`)
- [ ] No new undefined references or citations
- [ ] Uses existing macros from `main.tex` where applicable
- [ ] Cross-references use `\cref{}` (not manual numbering)
- [ ] Commit messages follow format: `ch05: fix Sauer-Shelah proof typo`
